2026-03-28.name: Braised lamb shoulder with white beans

steps.instruction: Soak beans overnight in cold water. Drain before using.
Season lamb generously with salt and pepper. Brown on all sides in a heavy pot over high heat, then set aside.
Soften carrot and celery in the same pot for 5 minutes. Add wine and reduce by half.
Return lamb to the pot. Add beans, stock, and herbs. Liquid should come halfway up the lamb.
Cover and braise in a 160°C oven for 2–2.5 hours until meat is falling off the bone.
Rest 10 minutes before serving. Taste beans and adjust seasoning.

2026-03-28.notes: Can be started the day before — reheat gently on the stovetop.

2026-03-29.name: Roast chicken with tarragon butter

steps.instruction: Combine butter, tarragon, lemon zest, salt and pepper. Loosen the skin of the chicken and push most of the butter under it.
Stuff the cavity with lemon halves and garlic. Rub remaining butter over the outside.
Roast at 220°C for 20 minutes, then reduce to 180°C for a further 50–60 minutes until juices run clear.
Rest 15 minutes before carving.

2026-03-29.notes: Season the bird the night before if possible.

2026-03-30.name: Spaghetti carbonara

steps.instruction: Cook guanciale in a cold pan over medium heat until fat renders and edges crisp. Remove from heat.
Whisk eggs, yolks, and cheese together with a generous amount of black pepper.
Cook pasta in well-salted water. Reserve 2 cups pasta water before draining.
Add hot pasta to the pan with guanciale (off heat). Add egg mixture and toss vigorously, adding pasta water a splash at a time until sauce coats each strand.
Serve immediately with extra cheese and pepper.

2026-03-30.notes: No cream. The starch in the pasta water is what makes the sauce silky.

2026-03-31.name: Miso-glazed cod with bok choy

steps.instruction: Whisk miso, mirin, and sake together. Marinate cod for at least 30 minutes (overnight is better).
Wipe most of the marinade off the fish. Broil or pan-sear on high heat for 3–4 minutes per side until caramelised.
Meanwhile, blanch or steam bok choy until just tender, 2–3 minutes.
Serve fish over bok choy. Scatter sesame seeds.

2026-03-31.notes: Marinate the night before — takes 2 minutes prep and makes it noticeably better.

ingredients.name: Chicken thighs, minced or finely chopped

steps.instruction: Stir-fry garlic in a very hot wok until fragrant, 30 seconds.
Add chicken and cook on high heat, breaking it apart, until cooked through and starting to caramelise, about 5 minutes.
Add chilli, soy sauce, oyster sauce, and a splash of water. Toss.
Off heat, stir in basil until just wilted. Serve over rice with a fried egg on top if liked.
Soften onion and peppers in olive oil over medium heat, 8 minutes. Add spices and cook 1 minute more.
Pour in tomatoes, season well, and simmer 10 minutes until thickened.
Make wells in the sauce and crack in the eggs. Cover and cook over low heat until whites are set but yolks still runny, 5–7 minutes.
Scatter feta and fresh herbs. Eat straight from the pan with bread.

2026-04-03.name: Grilled salmon with lentils and salsa verde

steps.instruction: Simmer lentils in water with a bay leaf until just tender, 20–25 minutes. Drain and season.
Blend parsley, capers, mustard, lemon juice, and olive oil to a rough salsa verde. Season.
Season salmon and cook skin-side down in a hot pan for 4 minutes until skin is crisp. Flip and cook 1 minute more.
Serve salmon on lentils, salsa verde spooned over.
